decks.notes: The main focus of the deck is to control the game through a combination of counterspells, card draw, and removal in order to outvalue the opponent and gain a resource advantage. By utilizing cards like Stock Up, Jeskai Revelation, and Accumulate Wisdom, the deck can consistently draw cards and find answers to threats. Firebending Lesson and Combustion Technique act as removal spells to deal with opposing creatures, while cards like It'll Quench Ya! and Iroh's Demonstration provide additional utility. Tablet of Discovery and Great Hall of the Biblioplex offer card advantage and mana fixing to further support the control strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of removal spells (such as Burst Lightning and Sunderflock), counter spells (like Spell Snare), and card advantage through cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand. The deck also includes cards like Impractical Joke and Traumatic Critique to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The win condition revolves around playing big threats like Hearth Elemental and utilizing Prismari Charm for additional versatility. The mana base is designed to ensure consistent access to the deck's spells and abilities.

The main concept of this Izzet Control deck is to efficiently control the game through card advantage and removal spells, using powerful draw spells such as Jeskai Revelation and Accumulate Wisdom to maintain a full hand while setting up devastating finishers like Combustion Technique and Avengers Disassembled. The deck also utilizes the unique abilities of key cards like Price of Freedom and Firebending Lesson to disrupt the opponent's strategy and gain tempo advantage. With a well-balanced mix of control elements and powerful late-game threats, this deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent in order to secure victory.

The main strategy of this Jeskai Control deck revolves around efficiency and resource management. By utilizing cards like Stock Up, Three Steps Ahead, and Tablet of Discovery, the deck aims to control the pace of the game and outvalue the opponent with card advantage. Cards like Combustion Technique and Jeskai Revelation provide powerful board clears and card draw to maintain control of the battlefield. The inclusion of Ral, Crackling Wit and Gran-Gran offer additional card advantage and utility to deal with various threats. Overall, this deck focuses on maintaining control and outpacing the opponent through careful resource management.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a combination of powerful spells and creatures. By using cards like Eddymurk Crab, Burst Lightning, Opt, and Spell Snare, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while also setting up its own win condition. With a mix of removal spells, card draw, and counterspells, the deck aims to keep the opponent on the back foot while slowly building up its own board presence. Additionally, cards like Winternight Stories and Multiversal Passage provide versatility and options for different situations.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of card advantage, removal, and counter spells. By utilizing the powerful control tools offered by Jeskai colors, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast opponents by denying their threats and imposing its own game plan. With a mix of card draw, removal spells, and powerful finishers like Thor, God of Thunder, the deck aims to control the pace of the game and dictate the flow of play until it can secure a win condition.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient creature strategy. By utilizing a combination of low-cost creatures like Llanowar Elves and Badgermole Cub, along with powerful finishers such as Brightglass Gearhulk and Surrak, Elusive Hunter, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain that pressure throughout the game. The deck also includes some control elements like Seam Rip and Meltstrider's Resolve to disrupt the opponent's game plan and secure victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing control cards to disrupt the opponent's strategy and stall the game until you can establish a winning board state. By utilizing cards like Cryogen Relic and Perilous Snare to control the board, and cards like Meticulous Archive and Krang, Master Mind to draw cards and gain card advantage, you can outlast your opponent and eventually overwhelm them with powerful finishers like Pinnacle Starcage and United Battlefront. This deck aims to stall, control, and ultimately win through strategic play and careful resource management.

This deck focuses on quickly building a strong board presence with efficient creatures and combat tricks to overwhelm your opponent. By playing aggressive creatures like Pawpatch Recruit and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker early on, and utilizing cards like Brightglass Gearhulk and Jennifer Walters to buff your creatures, you aim to deal damage quickly and efficiently. Utilizing cards like Abandoned Air Temple and Multiversal Passage, you can ensure a consistent mana base to play your threats and close out the game before your opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on using a combination of control spells and creatures to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building up card advantage and tempo. Cards like Eddymurk Crab, Impractical Joke, and Sunderflock help to limit the opponent's options and stall the game, while spells like Burst Lightning, Spell Snare, and Spell Pierce provide removal and disruption. The deck also utilizes draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand to dig for key pieces and maintain a consistent flow of cards. Overall, the goal is to outlast the opponent and win through attrition.

This deck focuses on using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw to control the game and outvalue the opponent. It aims to stall the game until it can establish a strong board presence with powerful creatures like Hearth Elemental and Eddymurk Crab, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Burst Lightning and Spell Pierce. The deck utilizes a mix of efficient instants and sorceries to constantly keep the opponent on the back foot and maintain control until it can close out the game.

This deck focuses on quickly flooding the board with aggressive creatures and maximizing damage output. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of efficient creatures and combat tricks, utilizing a mix of white, black, and red cards to create a powerful aggressive strategy. By efficiently utilizing its mana base and incorporating a mix of creatures with various abilities, this deck is able to apply pressure early and maintain a consistent stream of threats throughout the game.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of low-cost creatures and powerful support spells. By utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves and Pawpatch Recruit to establish an early board presence, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while also controlling the board with spells like Seam Rip and Soul-Guide Lantern. With a focus on aggression and efficient creature plays, this deck is designed to win by outpacing the opponent and securing victory through consistent damage output.

This deck focuses on fast-paced gameplay and overwhelming the opponent with a combination of powerful creatures and efficient spells. By using cards like Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker and Practiced Offense, along with support from Llanowar Elves and Brightglass Gearhulk, the goal is to quickly build a strong board presence and deal damage to the opponent. Multiversal Passage and Abandoned Air Temple provide additional resources and flexibility, while cards like Erode and Seam Rip offer removal options. Overall, the strategy is to apply pressure early and maintain control of the battlefield.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is focused on quickly building a board presence with efficient creatures like Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker and Pawpatch Recruit, supported by cards like Brightglass Gearhulk and Practiced Offense to push for fast damage. Abandoned Air Temple and Ba Sing Se provide extra mana sources, while cards like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Jennifer Walters offer additional threats. The inclusion of removal spells like Erode and Seam Rip help control the board, while Multiversal Passage and Hushwood Verge provide consistent mana fixing and ramp. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and combat tricks.

The main concept of this Control - Izzet Control deck is to utilize a combination of counter spells, card draw, and removal to control the game and out-value the opponent. The deck focuses on card advantage with spells like Artist's Talent and Accumulate Wisdom, while also using efficient removal like Combustion Technique and Boomerang Basics. By controlling the board and drawing into powerful threats like Gran-Gran and Monument to Endurance, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and win through attrition.
